  "claims": [
    "AB 2300 phases out the use of Di(2-ethylhexyl)phthalate (DEHP) in intravenous (IV) bags and tubing.",
    "DEHP has been linked to numerous adverse health effects, particularly impacting vulnerable patients undergoing critical treatments.",
